Class RestaurantSettingsDAO

java.lang.Object
DB.DBController
DAO.RestaurantSettingsDAO
public class RestaurantSettingsDAO extends DBController
Data Access Object (DAO) for managing general restaurant configurations. This class handles the persistence of WeeklyOpeningHours and global settings like the maximum table capacity allowed in the restaurant.

    • RestaurantSettingsDAO

      public RestaurantSettingsDAO()

  • Method Details

    • getAllWeeklyOpeningHours

      public List<WeeklyOpeningHours> getAllWeeklyOpeningHours()
      Retrieves the standard weekly schedule of the restaurant.
      Returns:
      a List of WeeklyOpeningHours representing the opening and closing times for each day of the week.

    • insertWeeklyOpeningHours

      public boolean insertWeeklyOpeningHours(WeeklyOpeningHours hours)
      Inserts a new daily schedule record into the settings. Defaults the MaxTables to 10 for new entries.
      Parameters:
      hours - the schedule to insert.
      Returns:
      true if successful.

    • updateOpeningHours

      public Boolean updateOpeningHours(RestaurantSettings r, Day d)
      Updates only the opening time for a specific day using the main settings object. * @param r the RestaurantSettings object.
      Parameters:
      d - the Day to update.
      Returns:
      true if updated successfully.

    • updateClosingHours

      public Boolean updateClosingHours(RestaurantSettings r, Day d)
      Updates only the closing time for a specific day using the main settings object. * @param r the RestaurantSettings object.
      Parameters:
      d - the Day to update.
      Returns:
      true if updated successfully.

    • deleteWeeklyOpeningHours

      public boolean deleteWeeklyOpeningHours(Day day)
      Removes the schedule for a specific day from the database.
      Parameters:
      day - the Day enum to remove.
      Returns:
      true if deletion succeeded.

    • updateMaxTable

      public Boolean updateMaxTable(RestaurantSettings r)
      Updates the global maximum number of tables allowed in the restaurant. This limit affects the availability logic for all future reservations.
      Parameters:
      r - the RestaurantSettings object containing the new max limit.
      Returns:
      true if successful.

    • existsDay

      public boolean existsDay(Day day)
      Checks if a configuration for a specific day already exists in the database. * @param day the Day to check.
      Returns:
      true if a record exists.

    • deleteSpecialDate

      public boolean deleteSpecialDate(LocalDate date)
      Permanently removes a special date entry from the database. * @param date the LocalDate to remove.
      Returns:
      true if the deletion succeeded.

    • updateOpeningHours

      public boolean updateOpeningHours(WeeklyOpeningHours hours)
      Updates the opening hours based on a WeeklyOpeningHours object. * @param hours the object containing the day and new time.
      Returns:
      true if successful.

    • updateClosingHours

      public boolean updateClosingHours(WeeklyOpeningHours hours)
      Updates the closing hours based on a WeeklyOpeningHours object. * @param hours the object containing the day and new time.
      Returns:
      true if successful.
